rationale: The US-Iran peace understanding continues to be confirmed across multiple sources with markets responding positively and oil falling — this remains the dominant story for US residents, though it is a continuation of last cycle's development. Score adjusted down: ongoing situation without qualitative change.

top_events.title: US and Iran announce 'understanding' to end the war; oil falls, markets jump
top_events.summary: Multiple sources confirm the US-Iran peace deal is taking shape, with oil prices falling and stock markets rising — directly affecting US consumers' fuel costs and retirement accounts.

top_events.title: China arrests US academic at conference for 'espionage activities'
top_events.summary: Another US academic detained by China continues an established pattern of US-China tensions — no qualitative escalation, but a reminder of risks for Americans traveling to China.

top_events.title: Trump says leader of Venezuelan Tren de Aragua gang killed in US strike
top_events.summary: Confirmed killing of a Tren de Aragua leader in a US strike is a continuation of established domestic security operations — no qualitative escalation for daily US life.
